hooks.command: script="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/scripts/wiki_session_start.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script" wiki-index; else echo '{}'; fi
script="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/scripts/wiki_session_start.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script" git-context; else echo '{}'; fi
script="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/scripts/wiki_write_gate.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script"; else echo '{}'; fi
script="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/scripts/wiki_stop_hook.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script" mark-commit; else echo '{}'; fi
script="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/scripts/wiki_stop_hook.py"; if test -f "$script"; then python3 "$script"; else echo '{}'; fi
